Takeaway: Much higher lung cancer risk; rises with years/cigarettes smoked

Group: People who do not smoke (little/no secondhand smoke)
Takeaway: Much lower chance, but lung cancer can still occur from radon, pollution, genetics, etc.

Group: People who do not smoke but get secondhand smoke
Takeaway: Higher than unexposed never-smokers, but far below active smokers; ~7,300 U.S. lung cancer deaths/year from SHS
